summary: Phase 2 testing completed successfully. All new features tested including new scoring system (NA/0/1/2), 11 criteria with comprehension, percentage-based scores, agent name field, advanced filters, agent comparison, and CSV export.

Backend Phase 2: Advanced filtering by agent, priority, score min/max operational

Backend Phase 2: CSV export endpoint working (fixed routing issue)

AI Integration: Analysis completes in 7-8 seconds with proper Phase 2 scoring
Data persistence: New Phase 2 fields correctly stored in database
